nodes.label: BasicEventElementEntity
nodes.description: A basic event element.

nodes.label: BlobWithContentType
nodes.description: A Blob is a data element representing a file that is contained in the value attribute with its source code. The code syntax is characterized by its content type (MIME type).

nodes.label: blobValue
nodes.description: The data of the BLOB (Binary Large Object).

nodes.label: BlobWithContentTypeEntity
nodes.description: A Blob is a data element representing a file that is contained in the value attribute with its source code. The code syntax is characterized by its content type (MIME type).

nodes.label: ISO8601Duration
nodes.description: ISO 8601 duration format.

nodes.label: DocumentIdentifierSet
nodes.description: Each document is uniquely discoverable via its identifier. If more information is needed, please refer to the 'Handover Documentation'.

nodes.label: globalAssetId
nodes.description: Globally unique identifier of an asset.

nodes.label: AasEntityType
nodes.description: A predefined submodel element subtype of the Asset Administration Shell used to model entities without additional statements.

nodes.label: resourceValue
nodes.description:
Path and name of the file (with file extension).

The path can be absolute or relative.

nodes.label: ResourceWithContentType
nodes.description: A file is a data element that represents an address to a file (a locator). The value is a URI that can represent an absolute or relative path.

nodes.label: expiryDate
nodes.description: Datum zu welchem die Kennzeichnung abläuft.

nodes.label: markingName
nodes.description: Common name of the marking.

nodes.label: markingFile
nodes.description: Conformity symbol of the marking.

nodes.label: issueDate
nodes.description: Datum zu welchem die Kennzeichnung ausgestellt wurde.

nodes.label: markingAdditionalText
nodes.description: Zusätzlicher sprechender Text für die Kennzeichnung.

nodes.label: designationOfCertificateOrApproval
nodes.description: Alphanumeric character sequence identifying a certificate or approval.

nodes.label: Date
nodes.description: Date in format CCYY-MM-DD.

nodes.label: Marking
nodes.preferredName: single marking information. Note: CE marking is declared as mandatory according to the Blue Guide of the EU-Commission

nodes.label: Markings
nodes.description: Note: CE marking is declared as mandatory according to EU Blue Guide.

nodes.label: MultiLanguageTexts
nodes.description: A set of language-text items.

nodes.label: rangeMinAbstract
nodes.description: Minimum value within range.

nodes.label: rangeMaxAbstract
nodes.description: Maximum value within range.

nodes.label: RangeTypeAbstract
nodes.description:
A range data element is a data element that defines a range with min and max.

 If the min value is missing, the value is assumed to be negative infinite.
 If the max value is missing, the value is assumed to be positive infinite.

nodes.label: RelationshipElementEntity
nodes.description: A predefined submodel element subtype of the Asset Administration Shell used to model relationships.

nodes.label: SpecificAssetId
nodes.description: A specific asset ID describes a generic supplementary identifying attribute of the asset. The specific asset ID is not necessarily globally unique.

nodes.label: specificAssetIdName
nodes.description: Name of the asset identifier.

nodes.label: specificAssetIdValue
nodes.description: The value of the specific asset identifier with the corresponding name.

nodes.label: TestAspect
nodes.description: Test-Aspect.

nodes.label: ValueOnlyExampleAspect
nodes.description: Beispiel-Aspekt, der Charakteristiken für Submodel-Elemente testet.
